raw_notes: Stakeholders want a faster cross-border settlement experience. Current mainframe COBOL job runs at 18:00 daily and causes a 14-hour latency for European customers. Need to migrate to a real-time rail (TIPS/SEPA Instant). Compliance team flagged AML screening must remain inline. CFO wants a 30% reduction in operational cost. Ops noted that 12% of failed payments require manual reconciliation.
constraints: Must integrate with existing AML engine v3.2
Cannot exceed $2M capital expenditure in FY26
Regulatory approval required before EU rollout
